title: Denmark’s PM Frederiksen suffers election setback after standing up to Trump over Greenland
summary_full: Frederiksen had sought to capitalize on popular support after standing up to Trump's push to annex Greenland, a self-governing Danish territory.
summary_public: Frederiksen had sought to capitalize on popular support after standing up to Trump's push to annex Greenland, a self-governing Danish territory.
